stemHtml: Which of the following is an example of cabotage?

options.a: A UK airline takes passengers from Manchester to Paris.
options.b: An American airline takes passengers and cargo from New York to London, and then takes passengers from London to Paris.
options.c: A German airline takes passengers from Berlin to LA, and then takes passengers from LA to San Francisco.
options.d: An American airline takes passengers from London to Paris.
